message.content:
Find all code related to the signup flow and email verification enforcement in this project. Specifically:

1. Find the sign-up page component (likely under src/app/(auth)/sign-up/)
2. Find any middleware.ts file that protects routes
3. Find the auth-client.ts file
4. Find any components or pages that check `emailVerified` status
5. Search for "emailVerified" across the entire codebase
6. Search for "autoSignIn" across the codebase
7. Search for "sendOnSignUp" across the codebase
8. Search for "requireEmailVerification" across the codebase
9. Find the Better Auth route handler at src/app/api/auth/[...better-auth]/route.ts
10. Check if there's any redirect logic after signup

Be thorough — read all relevant files fully.

content.text: I'll conduct a thorough search of the codebase to find all signup flow and email verification enforcement related code. Let me start with multiple parallel searches.
Let me read the main source files I found:

content.content:
1→// =================================================================================================
     2→//
     3→// THIS FILE IS AUTOGENERATED BY THE BETTER-AUTH CLI
     4→//
     5→// DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE MANUALLY
     6→//
     7→// RUN 'pnpm auth:generate' TO REGENERATE
     8→//
     9→// =================================================================================================
    10→
    11→import { relations } from "drizzle-orm";
    12→import { pgTable, text, timestamp, boolean, index } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
    13→
    14→export const user = pgTable("user", {
    15→  id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    16→  name: text("name").notNull(),
    17→  email: text("email").notNull().unique(),
    18→  emailVerified: boolean("email_verified").default(false).notNull(),
    19→  image: text("image"),
    20→  createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
    21→  updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
    22→    .defaultNow()
    23→    .$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    24→    .notNull(),
    25→  trialExpiresAt: timestamp("trial_expires_at"),
    26→});
    27→
    28→export const session = pgTable(
    29→  "session",
    30→  {
    31→    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    32→    expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at").notNull(),
    33→    token: text("token").notNull().unique(),
    34→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
    35→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
    36→      .$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    37→      .notNull(),
    38→    ipAddress: text("ip_address"),
    39→    userAgent: text("user_agent"),
    40→    userId: text("user_id")
    41→      .notNull()
    42→      .references(() => user.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    43→  },
    44→  (table) => [index("session_userId_idx").on(table.userId)],
    45→);
    46→
    47→export const account = pgTable(
    48→  "account",
    49→  {
    50→    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    51→    accountId: text("account_id").notNull(),
    52→    providerId: text("provider_id").notNull(),
    53→    userId: text("user_id")
    54→      .notNull()
    55→      .references(() => user.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),
    56→    accessToken: text("access_token"),
    57→    refreshToken: text("refresh_token"),
    58→    idToken: text("id_token"),
    59→    accessTokenExpiresAt: timestamp("access_token_expires_at"),
    60→    refreshTokenExpiresAt: timestamp("refresh_token_expires_at"),
    61→    scope: text("scope"),
    62→    password: text("password"),
    63→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
    64→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
    65→      .$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    66→      .notNull(),
    67→  },
    68→  (table) => [index("account_userId_idx").on(table.userId)],
    69→);
    70→
    71→export const verification = pgTable(
    72→  "verification",
    73→  {
    74→    id: text("id").primaryKey(),
    75→    identifier: text("identifier").notNull(),
    76→    value: text("value").notNull(),
    77→    expiresAt: timestamp("expires_at").notNull(),
    78→    createdAt: timestamp("created_at").defaultNow().notNull(),
    79→    updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at")
    80→      .defaultNow()
    81→      .$onUpdate(() => /* @__PURE__ */ new Date())
    82→      .notNull(),
    83→  },
    84→  (table) => [index("verification_identifier_idx").on(table.identifier)],
    85→);
    86→
    87→export const userRelations = relations(user, ({ many }) => ({
    88→  sessions: many(session),
    89→  accounts: many(account),
    90→}));
    91→
    92→export const sessionRelations = relations(session, ({ one }) => ({
    93→  user: one(user, {
    94→    fields: [session.userId],
    95→    references: [user.id],
    96→  }),
    97→}));
    98→
    99→export const accountRelations = relations(account, ({ one }) => ({
   100→  user: one(user, {
   101→    fields: [account.userId],
   102→    references: [user.id],
   103→  }),
   104→}));
   105→

1→import { createEnv } from "@t3-oss/env-nextjs";
     2→import { z } from "zod";
     3→
     4→export const env = createEnv({
     5→  server: {
     6→    DATABASE_URL: z.url(),
     7→    BETTER_AUTH_SECRET: z.string().min(1),
     8→    RESEND_API_KEY: z.string().min(1),
     9→    E2B_API_KEY: z.string().min(1),
    10→    OPENROUTER_API_KEY: z.string().min(1),
    11→    NODE_ENV: z
    12→      .enum(["development", "test", "production"])
    13→      .default("development"),
    14→    GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID: z.string().min(1),
    15→    GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET: z.string().min(1),
    16→    EMAIL_DOMAIN: z.string().default("mail.runagents.co"),
    17→    DEV_ACCESS_TOKEN: z.string().min(1).optional(),
    18→    // Dodo Payments configuration
    19→    DODO_PAYMENTS_API_KEY: z.string().min(1),
    20→    // Required: for webhook signature verification
    21→    DODO_PAYMENTS_WEBHOOK_SECRET: z.string().min(1),
    22→    ENABLE_SIGNUPS: z.enum(["true", "false"]).default("true"),
    23→    // Basehub CMS
    24→    BASEHUB_TOKEN: z.string().min(1),
    25→    DODO_PAYMENTS_MODE: z.enum(["live_mode", "test_mode"]),
    26→  },
    27→  experimental__runtimeEnv: process.env,
    28→  skipValidation: !!process.env.SKIP_ENV_VALIDATION,
    29→});
    30→

     3→ *
     4→ * Product IDs are hardcoded here instead of in .env because they are
     5→ * stable identifiers tied to the Dodo dashboard products and referenced
     6→ * by both the server (auth.ts checkout plugin) and the client (checkout button).
     7→ */

    10→    standard: {
    11→      productId: "pdt_0NYqQpfznRCmEvle1bLgY",
    12→      slug: "standard-plan",
    13→      label: "Pro",
    14→      price: "$49/month",
    15→    },
    16→  },
    17→  /** Self-managed trial duration in days */
    18→  trialDays: 7,
    19→} as const;
    20→
